pre_game.message: Hey J, I'm G and I'm really pumped about this game—I've always loved a good challenge where you can win some cash. What about you, what's your take on it?

Hey G, nice to meet you—I'm J, and yeah, I'm super excited about this too; I've got some big plans for any winnings, like finally getting that dream car I've been eyeing. What's got you so pumped for the challenge?

That's awesome about your dream car, J—I'm pumped because I live for these kinds of games; winning could mean helping out my family with some bills or a fun trip, you know? What's the make and model you're eyeing?
Oh, totally, G—it's a Tesla Model 3; I've been dreaming about that sleek design and tech for ages. Helping your family sounds awesome—what kind of trip are you planning?
Oh, that's cool, J—a road trip to the mountains with my family sounds perfect, like escaping for some hiking and bonfires; what feature of the Tesla Model 3 are you most excited about?
That's great, G—a mountain road trip sounds epic; for the Tesla, I'm most hyped about the autopilot feature, it would make long drives so relaxing—what's your favorite part about hiking?
Oh, for sure, J—the fresh air and those stunning views from the top are my favorite, it's super rewarding after the hike; do you get out for drives in your Tesla yet?
Haha, not yet, G—I'm still dreaming about it since I haven't bought it, which is why I'm all in on this game; what's your favorite hiking spot you've been to?
Haha, yeah, I get that—my favorite hiking spot has to be the Grand Canyon; those massive views are unreal and always leave me in awe—have you got any road trips planned if we win big in this game?
Haha, that's epic about the Grand Canyon, G—it sounds amazing! If we win big, I'd totally plan a road trip in my new Tesla, maybe up the coast for some ocean views.
